name: Little Pigs in Blankets
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap each thin slice of bacon around a large oyster.
2. Secure the ends together with a toothpick.
3. Place the wrapped oysters under hot flame.
4. Turn the oysters frequently to ensure even cooking and browning.
5. Continue broiling until both the bacon and oyster are crisp and brown.
6. Serve immediately after cooking.
